channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: A tiny discount makes the iPhone 17 the better buy compared to the more affordable iPhone 17e — here's why
item.description: The iPhone 17e may be the exciting new sub-AU$1,000 iPhone, but snagging the iPhone 17 for even just AU$50 is still the better buy for a fair few reasons, and I've broken them down for you.

item.title: Picsart now allows creators to ‘hire’ AI assistants through agent marketplace
item.description: Picsart's AI agent marketplace will launch with four agents, then add more agents each week.

item.title: Hyundai, Kia expand Nvidia partnership for self-driving tech
item.description: The group said it will leverage Nvidia Corp.'s data platforms and AI technologies and will integrate data into a unified learning pipeline.

item.title: NYT Connections hints today: Clues, answers for March 17, 2026
item.description: Connections is a New York Times word game that's all about finding the "common threads between words." How to solve the puzzle.

item.title: NYT Strands hints, answers for March 17, 2026
item.description: The NYT Strands hints and answers you need to make the most of your puzzling experience.

item.title: Wordle today: Answer, hints for March 17, 2026
item.description: Here's the answer for "Wordle" #1732 on March 17 as well as a few hints, tips, and clues to help you solve it yourself.

item.title: Skild AI, Nvidia bring robot brain to Blackwell assembly lines
item.description: Skild partner with ABB Robotics and Teradyne's Universal Robots to embed its software and deploy "brain" across industrial robots.

item.title: NTT Data unveils GCC program to boost AI adoption
item.description: The program will support GCC planning, governance design, talent development, and R&D co-creation.
